generated_oml:
instance SensorNetwork : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor network on Physical Twin providing operational data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SensorDataTransmitted
]

instance SensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SensorNetwork
]

instance SensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Operational data from sensor networks"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MonitoringEnabler, SimulationEnabler, FaultDetectorEnabler, StateEstimatorEnabler, OptimizerEnabler, SupervisoryControllerEnabler, CalibrationAlgorithmEnabler
]

instance CadGeometricModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model for physical dimensions"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MonitoringEnabler, SimulationEnabler, FaultDetectorEnabler, StateEstimatorEnabler, OptimizerEnabler, SupervisoryControllerEnabler, CalibrationAlgorithmEnabler
]

instance DifferentialEquationsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Differential equations for dynamic behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MonitoringEnabler, SimulationEnabler, FaultDetectorEnabler, StateEstimatorEnabler, OptimizerEnabler, SupervisoryControllerEnabler, CalibrationAlgorithmEnabler
]

instance MonitoringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Monitoring algorithms for safety and operational efficiency assessment"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService
]

instance SimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Simulation algorithms for predicting Physical Twin behavior"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveSimulationService
]

instance FaultDetectorEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Fault detection algorithms that identify anomalies in system behavior"
    DTDFVocab:enables FaultDetectionService
]

instance StateEstimatorEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "State estimation algorithms for system state assessment"
    DTDFVocab:enables StateEstimatorService
]

instance OptimizerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Optimization algorithms for performance enhancement"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService
]

instance SupervisoryControllerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Supervisory controllers for automated adjustments"
    DTDFVocab:enables SupervisoryControllerService
]

instance CalibrationAlgorithmEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithms that update model parameters"
    DTDFVocab:enables CalibrationService
]

instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous monitoring of system safety and operational efficiency"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyMonitoringInsight, OperationalEfficiencyInsight
]

instance PredictiveSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive simulations for behavior forecasting under current operating conditions"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection mechanisms to identify anomalies"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionInsight
]

instance StateEstimatorService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "State estimators for system state assessment"
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemStateEstimationInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization services via optimizers for performance enhancement"
    DTDFVocab:provides PerformanceOptimizationInsight
]

instance SupervisoryControllerService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Supervisory controllers for automated adjustments"
    DTDFVocab:provides AutomatedCorrectiveAction
]

instance CalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Model calibration services to update parameters"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelCalibrationInsight
]

instance SafetyMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Assessment of system safety status"
]

instance OperationalEfficiencyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Assessment of operational efficiency"
]

instance PredictiveInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Forecasted behavior of Physical Twin"
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Anomaly detection in system behavior"
]

instance SystemStateEstimationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Estimated current state of the system"
]

instance PerformanceOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized performance recommendations"
]

instance AutomatedCorrectiveAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Corrective actions initiated by automated algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ModelCalibrationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Updated model parameters for accurate simulation"
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithms update models of the Cyber-Physical System (CPS) and environment with parameter estimates derived from sensor data. Monitors use this data to check system performance against safety and optimality criteria, triggering corrective actions upon violation detection."
]
